guardrails.title: No Synchronous I/O in Hot Paths
guardrails.body: Synchronous I/O (e.g. `readFileSync`) shall not be used inside loops or bulk-processing paths. Use streams or async APIs instead.

guardrails.title: Validate User Input at Entry Point
guardrails.body: CLI arguments and stdin input shall be validated at the entry point. Do not pass unvalidated input to internal functions.
